title: LILYGO T-Echo Stock Antenna

manufacturer.description: Stock LoRa antenna included with LILYGO T-Echo device.

test_results.notes: Included with LILYGO T-Echo board. Exhibits high VSWR across the ISM band, indicating poor performance. Antenna replacement is recommended for improved range and efficiency.

description: 915MHz antenna bundled with LILYGO T-Echo. Performance is suboptimal in ISM band and may hinder radio range.
